title: Daily Claim
description: Initialize your membership once a day to verify connectivity and claim your daily XP allocation.

title: Weekly Claim
description: Claim your 150 XP weekly allocation. Resets automatically 7 days after your claim.

title: Task 1
description: Complete the current Admin task on our official X account and paste the link below.

title: Task 2
description: Complete the secondary Admin task on our official X account and paste the link below.

title: Invite a Member
description: Successfully recruit a new member to the Network using your link.
